title: Tri-Mark VII Interceptor

The '''Tri-Mark VII Interceptor''' was a multi-purpose [[Starship/Legends|starship]] built by [[Elsinore-Cordova Engineering]] to serve as a heavy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]/[[Bomber/Legends|bomber]]/light [[Transport/Legends|transport]]/[[Prison/Legends|prison]] ship. Equipped with three Elsinore-Cordova [[Turbodyne]] engines, the Tri-Mark VII was very fast, and its large cargo capacity allowed for the transport of up to twenty troops and four prisoners, in addition to a crew of three. General maintenance was provided by two [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]].

Originally designed to be a [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] interceptor, intended for interstellar pursuit, the Tri-Mark VII came equipped with six auto-targeting dual [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turrets and a ventral [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher.

One prominent Tri-Mark VII was the [[Longshot (Tri-Mark VII Interceptor)|''Longshot'']], belonging to the [[Muttani]] criminal [[Meeko Ghintee]].
